_doc: LPDDR5 spec (Phase 1.2 analytic) = the simulated forward-looking SoC host memory. 64-bit bus, 6400 MT/s -> 51.2 GB/s peak (assumption). eff_BW 33.3 = 51.2 x 0.65 (sim). NOTE: sim efficiency 0.65 is CONSERVATIVE vs the 0.71 measured on the production-card LPDDR4x -- LPDDR5 efficiency was NOT measured on our silicon (it is a DIFFERENT memory), so we discount below the measured 4x value rather than assume parity. Ramulator2 LPDDR5 cross-check = Phase 1.3; multi-unit contention = Phase 2.

notes.eff_explanation: 0.65 sim vs 0.71 measured: LPDDR5 eff not measured on our silicon (different memory); discounted below the LPDDR4x anchor, not assumed equal.
notes.heavy_sim: Ramulator2 LPDDR5 single-stream cross-check = Phase 1.3; multi-unit contention value = Phase 2.
